summary: Added a self-simplification pass that runs automatically after all tasks complete and before finalize in the feature execution flow (run.mjs). The pass dispatches a simplify-pass agent on code files changed in the feature branch, re-runs the quality gate to validate no regressions, and reverts changes if the gate fails. 45 new tests cover file filtering, changed-file detection, agent dispatch, gate re-run logic, and revert-on-failure behavior.
